name: cpig-fieldops-01-multi-type-scene
description: Phase 1B diagnosis testbed (plan: squishy-frolicking-starfish.md). Builds a multi-type CPig scene exercising all FOUR primitive command paths in one Rhino session: CPigSphere (tape rep), CPigBox (tape rep), CPigGyroid (structural tape rep, origin-centered), CPigTPMS (DENSE u_sdfGrid rep — the just-shipped Penumbra bug 0055 fix). The WaitForPenumbraFrame gate after each command is the deterministic regression guard; if any primitive fails to display, the gate times out and the test is Crashed. Single viewport capture at end shows the final 4-atom scene. Side-channel telemetry %LocalAppData%/Penumbra/preview/telemetry.ndjson carries cpig.build (per-session diag), cpig.rep.live (NEW — per-rep change diag), gl.scene.loaded (atoms,bounds), gl.grid.upload (per dense field, post-fix diag from RayMarchConduit). Catches Penumbra 0055 regression on TPMS dense + multi-rep dispatch on 4 different rep classes simultaneously. mode:capture for manual + VLM review.

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D viewport with FOUR distinct ray-marched SDF surfaces visible: a smooth sphere, a rectangular box, a periodic gyroid lattice (a TPMS structure with repeating cells), and a dense voxel-baked TPMS field. The surfaces must be DISTINCT shapes — not collapsed into one geometry, not just a wireframe outline.

checkpoints.name: cpig-fieldops-multi-type
checkpoints.description: Four distinct CPig SDF fields rendered simultaneously: sphere (tape), box (tape), gyroid lattice (structural tape, origin), TPMS (dense u_sdfGrid).
